title: Extra Vanilla Flavour
description: A modpack dedicated to a peaceful minecraft with extra flavour.
body:
If you want to check the new iteration of the "Extra Vanilla Flavour" check my new modpack - [Expocraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/expocraft) !

---

A simple minecraft modpack for a simple, yet beautiful adventure.

## How is this different from any other vanila+ modpacks

It is peaceful - easy difficulty focus. Is focused on creativity and building your **medieval city with steam-punk vibes**.
The modpack also doesn't want to be packed with a lot mods. It will be **60 mods or below** and it will keep adding optimization mods and qol mods.
It can also be used in a creative world with a lot of new building blocs.

# What it includes?

* Optimization (RELEASED - BETA 1)
* Furniture (RELEASED - 1.19.3)
* Airplanes (RELEASED - 1.19.3)
* New Armor (RELEASED - 1.19.3)
* Multiplayer features (RELEASED - 1.19.3) + Planed for 1.19.4

# What to expect

A casual minecraft playtrough with calming new features. Recommended playing on peaceful or on easy.

# Known bugs

* **On map generation use vanila world generation!!!**
